description: CompositionBeige boat neck t-shirt made of 70% bamboo and 30% organic cotton, batwing sleeves, graphic print on the front and wildcraft slogan at the back neckFitRegularWash careHand wash with like coloursDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm ironShow off your love for nature and urge for its protection with this wildcraft tee for women. Sober tone with print of flamingo on the front nails the minimalist trend of the moment. Wear this with skinny jeans and ballet shoes from enroute.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
